non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Take a message and follow up during business hours

after_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers every call, determines if it's an emergency, and routes accordingly. Emergencies are transferred to Marcus or Jesse. Non-emergencies are documented for morning follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers every call, qualifies the call, gathers information, and routes it to the appropriate person. Emergencies get transferred live. Non-emergencies get documented and sent to the team.
